missions.title: Understand I2P Connect
missions.goal: Explain the current mode, local-first model, and honest limits.
missions.user_outcome: The user knows what is available now and what comes later.

missions.title: Check Local I2P Readiness
missions.goal: Measure whether local I2P services are reachable.
missions.user_outcome: The user sees a clear local readiness state.

missions.title: Create Local Identity
missions.goal: Create identity material that stays on the user's device.
missions.user_outcome: The user understands storage, backup, and loss risks.
missions.release_gate: Requires local persistence design and tests.

missions.title: Verify Contact Invite
missions.goal: Help two users verify contact information safely.
missions.user_outcome: The user understands why verification matters.
missions.release_gate: Requires invite format and verification tests.

missions.title: Send First Private Message
missions.goal: Queue and send a first private message after transport and envelope work exists.
missions.user_outcome: The user sees measured message state.
missions.release_gate: Requires message storage, transport, envelope, and log-safety tests.

missions.title: Try Audio Note
missions.goal: Explore asynchronous audio notes as an experiment.
missions.user_outcome: The user understands permission and storage behavior.
missions.release_gate: Requires audio permission copy, local storage, and experimental labeling.
